CustomField.description: Financing tips for buyers of affordable homes. this will appear on listings for ownership units
CustomField.label: Development Financing Requirements

value.fullName: All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage. CGP&H will provide you a list of lenders. Lenders not on this list may not be able to finance mortgages for deed restricted affordable homes.
value.label: All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage. CGP&H will provide you a list of lenders. Lenders not on this list may not be able to finance mortgages for deed restricted affordable homes.

value.fullName: There is no fee to apply for this program. All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage.
value.label: There is no fee to apply for this program. All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage.

value.fullName: All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for a mortgage. Please contact First Credit Corporation, Manufactured Home Finance & Insurance regarding financing options at 1-800-562-6036, or www.firstcreditcorp.com.
value.label: All non-cash buyers must be able to qualify for financing. Please contact First Credit Corporation, Manufactured Home Finance & Insurance at 1-800-562-6036 or www.firstcreditcorp.com or Priority Funding at www.priloan.com regarding financing options.

value.fullName: If you are interested in purchasing an affordable home, you must be able to secure financing. You may work with any lender. Buyers have recently worked with Peapack-Gladstone Bank, Amaro Pereira, (908) 334-8789, apereira@pgbank.com.
value.label: If you are interested in purchasing an affordable home, you must be able to secure financing. You may work with any lender. Buyers have recently worked with Peapack-Gladstone Bank, Amaro Pereira, (908) 334-8789, apereira@pgbank.com.
